name: Backblaze, Inc.
business: Backblaze is a high-performance cloud storage platform for data-intensive use cases, including AI, cyber-resilience, and media workflows. It offers B2 Cloud Storage and Computer Backup services. As of December 31, 2025, it had over 500,000 customers in over 175 countries.

exposures.sentence: Customers use us to support their AI workflows.
help ensure the cyber-resilience of their organizations.
We lease data center spaces in California; Arizona; Virginia; Toronto, Canada; and Amsterdam, the Netherlands.

catalysts.event: Announced B2 Overdrive premium high-throughput offering
catalysts.sentence: in April 2025 we announced B2 Overdrive, a premium priced high-performance cloud storage solution

catalysts.event: Opened Toronto data center region and established Canadian subsidiary
catalysts.sentence: we also opened a new data center region in Toronto, Canada and established a wholly owned subsidiary in Canada in January 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Worldwide Public Cloud IaaS Storage market expected to grow to $118 billion by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: According to International Data Corporation forecasts, the worldwide market for Public Cloud IaaS Storage is expected to grow to $118 billion by 2028.
